---
title: "About Me"
description: |
  BSc Politics and International Relations student at the University of Essex
output: distill::distill_article
---
## Capstone Project
I am currently working on my dissertation, focussing on government effectiveness and political participation.

## Previous Modules
- GV110 - Thinking like a Social Scientist
- GV207 - Quantitative Political Analysis
- GV217 - Conflict Analysis

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```
